# Product Requirement Document:

# Localized My Account experience for B2B

## Context

The new version of My Account was built in FastStore to enable B2B use cases not covered in the IO version (buying policies, custom fields mainly). This was an important delivery for the ODP project, and we decided to go with a first version not integrated with the hCMS/CMS to meet our deadlines during H1.

In H2, we need to evolve My Account to support this integration, **enabling Portuguese in My Account beyond English**.

## Use cases

* Enable **non-English** B2B merchants to use My Account in FastStore (current labels are defined in VTEX FastStore code in English)
* Enable B2B merchants to use My Account in **English and in Portuguese**, at first.

## Target customers

* B2B merchants using Buyer Portal
* Single-language (Non-English)

**Key capabilities of the solution:**

### **1\. Use case: Enable Portuguese and English speaking B2B buyers to use My Account in FastStore**

1. Shopper sees labels of **native** **components in native pages** according to the the  buyer language.
   1. Labels from the following native pages: Menu, Profile, Orders list, Order details, User details, Security
   2. [Details of the labels](#which-labels-need-to-be-localized-in-my-account?)
   3. We don't need to worry about some fields that are already localized in other systems ([currency](#heading=h.68tjmfk3sqro), [payment method name](#heading=h.ebkmc8b4lwou), [order fields](#heading)).

### **2\. Use case: Enable B2B merchants to use My Account in multiple languages/currencies**

1. Shopper can set their preferred locale in the My Account storefront
   1. Shopper sees a component in the header to manually set their language/currency using session or local storage
      1. Create component variations considering just region/locale selection: either English (en-US) or Portuguese (pt-BR)
2. Shoppers see labels from native components in My Account according to the selected locale
   1. Get the updated locale through local/session storage
   2. Receive the content configured for the selected locale to be rendered in the component
3. When creating custom components for native or custom pages, external developers can define schemas that enable multi-language in CMS

# Questions

####  {#heading}

1. #### Which labels need to be localized in My Account? {#which-labels-need-to-be-localized-in-my-account?}

   1. **Organization and My Account header menu** \- “Profile”, “Orders”, “User Details", "Security", “Manage”, “Logout”
      1. ![][image1]
   2. **Title of native pages in the sidebar menu** \- “Profile”, “Orders”, “User Details", "Security"
      1. ![][image2]
   3. **Profile** \- “Profile”, “Name”, “Email”, “ID”
      1. ![][image3]
   4. **Orders list** \- “Orders”, “Search”, “Filters” (button), “Filters” (title), “Status”, Status values (filter), “Order Date”, “From-to”, Date type, “Clear All”, “View Results”, “Total”, “$”, “Placed on”, “Delivery by”, Status values (list), 1-24 “of” (page list)
      1. ![][image4]
      2. ![][image5]
   5. **Order details** \- “Order”, Status value, “Cancel order”, “Ordered by”, “Delivery”, “Delivery in 1 business day to”, “Status”, “Order placed”, date and time format, “Approval Pending”, “Payment authorization”, “Handling order”, “Ship order”, “Payment”, name of the payment method, currency, currency format, “Summary”, “Total dos Itens”, “Total dos Descontos”, “Total do Frete”, “Total da taxa”, “Total”, “Delivery in 1 business day to”, “1 item”,  “Total”, “Recipient”, “Delivery address”, “Each”, “Taxes”, “Total”
      1. ![][image6]
      2. ![][image7]
   6. **User details** \- “Name”, “Email”, “Role”, Role values, “Organizational unit”
      1. ![][image8]
   7. **Security** \- “Password”, “Reset password”, “Reset password” (title), “Current password”, “New password”, “Cancel”, “Save Password”, Success and Error messages.
      1. ![][image9]![][image10]
